classifications.subject: The new inner game: Your unfair advantage in the age of AI
classifications.reason: Productivity/mindset piece about personal advantage in AI era. Not technical AI/LLM/agent content. Featured author @joehudsonaoa appears to be a coach/consultant. All 20 links are Substack platform redirects (likes, comments, shares, subscription widgets) — no external article links captured.

classifications.subject: Record a skill
classifications.reason: Ben's Bites is a primary AI newsletter source. Title 'Record a skill' likely covers AI agent skill recording/capture tooling — directly relevant to the AI agent knowledge wiki. All 20 links are Substack platform redirects; full article text needed to extract external references and linked resources.

classifications.subject: China's CXMT Is Set to Challenge DRAM Incumbents
classifications.reason: Hardware/semiconductor analysis — CXMT DRAM competition with Samsung/SK Hynix/Micron. Tangentially relevant to AI compute supply chain but not core LLM/agent technology. SemiAnalysis is paywalled; unlikely to be fully extractable. Links include Substack profile pages for authors Dylan Patel and Ray Wang.

classifications.subject: 🛡️ OpenAI Arms the Cyber Defenders
classifications.reason: OpenAI applying LLMs/AI to cybersecurity defense — directly relevant entity (OpenAI) and application domain (AI for security). All 20 links are Beehiiv encrypted tracking URLs requiring full article fetch. Newsletter source name not determinable from URLs alone.
classifications.note: All links are Beehiiv encrypted tracking URLs — cannot determine the underlying article URLs without HTTP resolution. Source newsletter publication unknown.

classifications.subject: On Sakana Fugu
classifications.reason: Already documented in wiki at wiki/concepts/sakana-fugu.md (112 lines) with comprehensive coverage of TRINITY, Conductor, multi-agent orchestration architecture. Supplementary raw article exists at wiki/raw/articles/2026-06-22_sakana-fugu-multi-agent-system-model.md. AI Weekly is paywalled.

summary.pipeline_quality_note: All 5 newsletters contain only Substack/Beehiiv platform redirect URLs — no external article links or body text were captured by the email ingestion pipeline. For high-priority items, full article text must be fetched from the canonical Substack URLs.
